mapper.select: SELECT id, category, sub_category, detail_name, display_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM reference_coating_surface ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
SELECT id, category, sub_category, detail_name, display_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM reference_coating_surface WHERE category = #{category} ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, category, sub_category, detail_name, display_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM reference_coating_surface WHERE category ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR detail_name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY display_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE reference_coating_surface SET category = #{category}, sub_category = #{subCategory}, detail_name = #{detailName}, display_order = #{displayOrder}, is_active = #{isActive}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
